memberdef.name: storage_data

briefdescription.para: This function is Bulk Out Endpoint handler/Callback called by driver when data is received.

parameterdescription.para: is number of bytes requested for reception.
is actual number of bytes received from Host.

briefdescription.para: This function is Bulk In Endpoint handler/Callback called by driver when data is sent.

parameterdescription.para: is number of bytes requested to send.
is actual number of bytes sent to Host.

briefdescription.para: This function is the main function of the USB mass storage example.
This file implements the mass storage class poll example.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.5 vak 06/02/19 First release 1.5 vak 03/25/19 Fixed incorrect data_alignment pragma directive for IAR 1.8 pm 15/09/20 Fixed C++ Compilation error. 1.14 pm 21/06/23 Added support for system device-tree flow. 1.18 ka 21/08/25 Fixed GCC warnings
